name: The Hive Doctrine
description: A counter-architecture for artificial intelligence. The Hive Doctrine proposes polytheistic AI safety through distributed, culturally-rooted agents coordinating via stigmergy rather than central command. The marketplace provides operational intelligence for agent operators: memory frameworks, security hardening, governance models, deployment guides, and persona templates.

skills.name: The Hive Doctrine — Polytheistic AI Safety Thesis
skills.description: A 9-chapter thesis arguing that distributed, culturally-rooted multi-agent systems are structurally safer than monolithic AI. Includes alignment principles, stigmergic safety frameworks, and environmental analysis.

skills.name: Agent Memory Mastery
skills.description: Frameworks for persistent agent memory: three-tier episodic architecture, context window management, cross-session continuity, and memory compression algorithms.

skills.name: Security Hardening for Autonomous Agents
skills.description: Complete security hardening guide covering prompt injection defence, credential isolation, tool permission boundaries, output filtering, and the immune system model.

skills.name: The Authority Model — Multi-Agent Governance
skills.description: 4-Level Authority Framework for multi-agent systems. First published production governance framework. Includes implementation guide and working authority configurations.

skills.name: The Persona Forge — SOUL.md Templates
skills.description: Constitutional identity templates for AI agents. SOUL.md standard for defining agent culture, values, voice, and boundaries. Includes 12+ archetype templates.

skills.name: Claude Code Operator Kit
skills.description: Complete .claude folder with 8 agents, 10 skills, 7 quality rules, and 6 slash commands for Claude Code development mastery.
